list.title: Jobs
list.detail: The Jobs list owns scope, pagination, search, admin-view, and label state in the URL.
list.label: Label

detail.title: Job hub
detail.detail: The Job route restores a section-aware hub model for direct entry and refresh.

authoring.detail: Authoring consumes a normalized draft model instead of raw mixed backend payloads.

tasks.title: Job task
tasks.detail: Task routes resolve canonical job, candidate, and parent-return context before UI rendering.

requisition.buildCopy: Jobs-side requisition task-flow foundation with explicit save and no autosave persistence.
requisition.workflowCopy: Workflow-state route for requisition authoring stages and drift handling.

requisitionWorkflows.title: Requisition workflows
requisitionWorkflows.copy: Settings-owned requisition workflow administration foundation. Active authoring stays in Jobs workflow-state routes.
